prompt: Create a cozy farm simulation game showing a character watering crops in neat garden rows with a wooden farmhouse and red barn in the background. Include chickens pecking around the yard, a pig in a pen, and fruit trees ready for harvest. Sunrise lighting with warm golden tones. UI elements: energy bar, crop growth timers, seasonal calendar, inventory with seeds and tools, daily tasks checklist, and relationship hearts with farm animals. Peaceful, pastoral atmosphere with cartoon art style.
prompt_refined: A cozy farm simulation game screenshot, depicting a character watering neat garden rows. A wooden farmhouse and a red barn are positioned in the background. Chickens peck around the foreground yard, a pig is contained within a nearby pen, and fruit trees are laden with ready-for-harvest fruit. The scene is bathed in warm, golden sunrise light, evoking a peaceful, pastoral atmosphere with a cartoon art style. UI elements are present: an energy bar in the top-left corner, crop growth timers near the crops, a seasonal calendar in the top-right corner, an inventory bar displaying seeds and tools along the bottom, a daily tasks checklist on the left side, and relationship hearts floating above the farm animals.
objects: daily tasks checklist on the left side
